description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-theme` (T4-01) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-theme/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, theme name typed, color-scheme (light/dark/auto) typed, all token override types exported
2. Accessibility — color contrast requirements met for ALL theme variants (WCAG AA 4.5:1 for text, 3:1 for UI), prefers-color-scheme respected in auto mode, axe-core pass
3. Tests — light/dark/auto theme application, token override validation, nested themes, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — light/dark/custom theme demos, contrast checker integrated
5. CSS — three-tier token cascade correct (primitive → semantic → component), no hardcoded values in any tier, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB (just CSS custom props, no JS logic)
7. Drupal — applicable as body/section attribute

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-theme/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-theme — T4-01 antagonistic quality review
